comment.text: This is a label for a setting that defines the maximum allowed size for a single file during upload. It appears when configuring upload limits in the developer tools section.

usage.context:
<SizeLimitSetter
 labelText={
 config.isMultipleUpload
 ? config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSizePerFolder")
 : t("MaximumFileSizePerFile")
 : config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSize")
 : t("MaximumFileSize")
 }
 tooltipText={
